name: Diatomaceous Earth (Food-Grade)
description: Fossilized diatom shells composed of amorphous silica that mechanically damage insect exoskeletons, providing chemical-free pest control.
appearance: Off-white to grey fine powder; feels slightly gritty
solubility: Insoluble in water; slightly soluble in strong alkali
chemistry: Fossilized diatoms — microscopically sharp. Mechanical damage to insect exoskeletons = dehydration. No resistance development.
warnings: FOOD-GRADE only. Mask when applying. Ineffective when wet.
